channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: How to Find Inactive (Stale) User Accounts
item.description: Inactive accounts can soak up a lot of paid-for but unused product licenses. With increases for Microsoft 365 licenses due to come into effect from 1 July 2026, it’s time to find and remove unused licenses from inactive user accounts. We discuss two approaches by using the Microsoft 365 Licensing...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Troubleshooting Azure Container Apps and Jobs for .NET and Django Workloads
item.description: Introduction Deploying to Azure Container Apps feels like a huge step forward — you get serverless containers, automatic scaling, built-in ingress, and managed environments without managing Kubernetes directly. But when something goes wrong and your container refuses to start, or your Container App...
item.dc:creator: BhaktiRath95

item.title: Periodic code scanning of inactive repositories
item.description: GitHub code scanning now supports scheduled security scans of repositories that have had no pushes or pull requests for six months or more. Organizations can use this to maintain continuous… The post Periodic code scanning of inactive repositories appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: What to do? For the second time Windows Update that failed?
item.description: I am facing a recurring issue where Windows Update fails to install the same cumulative update for the second time in a row on my Windows 11 PC. The update downloads and reaches a certain percentage like 70 or 90 percent but then throws an error message and rolls back the changes. I have already...
item.dc:creator: Delilahsw

item.title: How to Delete And reinstalling Windows OS
item.description: I want to completely wipe my hard drive and perform a clean installation of Windows 10 or Windows 11 on my computer. I have already backed up all my personal files to an external drive but I am unsure of the correct steps to delete the existing operating system and reinstall a fresh copy without...
item.dc:creator: Su-Jace

item.title: How do you troubleshoot slow boot times after recent updates?
item.description: I’ve noticed my Windows system takes much longer to start after automatic updates. I’ve checked startup apps, disabled some, but it still feels sluggish. What steps do you take first when boot performance drops unexpectedly?
item.dc:creator: Feliox

item.title: Any source. Any destination. Ready for AI-era.
item.description: Telemetry is exploding, every new app, edge node, and AI agent is a new firehose, and AI has raised the bar on what that telemetry must be: governed, on open standards, observable at agent scale. Today, most teams answer that by stitching together a stack of disconnected tools, each catering to a...
item.dc:creator: shayoni_seth

item.title: What's new in Azure App Service at #MSBuild 2026
item.description: At Microsoft Build 2026, Azure App Service introduced a powerful set of updates designed to help organizations accelerate their journey into AI, without increasing complexity or cost. These innovations focus on one clear business outcome: enabling teams to build, deploy, and scale AI-powered...
item.dc:creator: Mayunk_Jain

item.title: Write Logic Apps in C#: introducing the Logic Apps Standard SDK
item.description: The workflow you always wished you could write in code If you build on Logic Apps Standard, you already know the deal: the runtime is excellent at the unglamorous parts of integration - connecting to systems, retrying, scaling, keeping run history you can actually debug. What you sometimes wanted...
item.dc:creator: WSilveira

item.title: Tools for Azure AD B2C migration now available
item.description: If you rely on Azure AD B2C for customer identity, you’re likely starting to evaluate what comes next. With Azure AD B2C no longer receiving new features and several features recently added to Microsoft Entra External ID, planning your migration is easier and can help you with this important next...
item.dc:creator: NamitaSingh

item.title: Turn insights into signals with Activator as a Business Event Publisher (Preview)
item.description: Activator can now publish Business Events. Turn KPI alerts, threshold breaches, and query results into structured, governed signals your entire organization can discover, consume, and act on.
item.dc:creator: GEGUIRGU

item.title: Analyze Your Business Events in Eventhouse and Real-Time Dashboards (Preview)
item.description: Your business events are now automatically stored and queryable in Eventhouse. Run historical analyses with KQL, build live Real-Time Dashboards, and turn every business signal into actionable intelligence, all without extra configuration.
item.dc:creator: GEGUIRGU

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND| OneDrive Office Hours | July 2025
item.description: Join the OneDrive product team live each month on our monthly OneDrive Customer Office Hours to hear what's top of mind, get insights into roadmap updates, and dig into a special topic. Each call includes live Q&A where you'll have a chance to ask the OneDrive product team any question about...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND| OneDrive Office Hours | August 2025
item.description: Join the OneDrive product team live each month on our monthly OneDrive Customer Office Hours to hear what's top of mind, get insights into roadmap updates, and dig into a special topic. Each call includes live Q&A where you'll have a chance to ask the OneDrive product team any question about...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND| OneDrive Office Hours | September 2025
item.description: Join the OneDrive product team live each month on our monthly OneDrive Customer Office Hours to hear what's top of mind, get insights into roadmap updates, and dig into a special topic. Each call includes live Q&A where you'll have a chance to ask the OneDrive product team any question about...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: OneDrive Office Hours | December 2025
item.description: Join the OneDrive product team live each month on our monthly OneDrive Customer Office Hours to hear what's top of mind, get insights into roadmap updates, and dig into a special topic. Each call includes live Q&A where you'll have a chance to ask the OneDrive product team any question about...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND | OneDrive Office Hours | January 2026
item.description: There’s no better way to start the new year than listening, learning, and taking action! OneDrive Consumer Office Hours are back this January, creating space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND | OneDrive Office Hours | February 2026
item.description: OneDrive Consumer Office Hours are back! Creating space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll walk through what’s new and open the floor for questions, feedback, and shared experiences. Register...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND | OneDrive Office Hours | March 2026
item.description: OneDrive Consumer Office Hours are back! Creating space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll walk through what’s new and open the floor for questions, feedback, and shared experiences. Register...
item.dc:creator: Rob_Nunez

item.description: Get ready for April’s OneDrive Customer Office Hours! This session creates space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll walk through what’s new and open the floor for questions, feedback, and shared...
item.dc:creator: sophiapeng

item.title: NOW ON DEMAND | OneDrive Office Hours | May 2026
item.description: Get ready for May’s OneDrive Customer Office Hours! This session creates space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll walk through what’s new and open the floor for questions, feedback, and shared...
item.dc:creator: sophiapeng

item.title: Logic Apps Aviators Newsletter - June 2026
item.description: In this issue: Ace Aviator of the Month News from our product group News from our community Ace Aviator of the Month June 2026's Ace Aviator: Florian De Langhe LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/floriandelanghe/ Florian De Langhe Lead Expert/Team Lead - Microsoft Integration @ delaware What's...
item.dc:creator: WSilveira

item.title: Microsoft Entra ID security updates: What organizations need to do now
item.description: Microsoft Entra ID continues to strengthen identity security by modernizing how authentication and access policies are enforced. As part of this effort, Microsoft is retiring legacy capabilities and closing gaps that attackers could exploit. These updates focus on three key areas: replacing Custom...
item.dc:creator: Swaroop Krishnamurthy

item.title: Microsoft Defender now monitors RPC activity
item.description: Remote procedure call (RPC) is a protocol commonly abused by attackers that allows functions implemented in a separate process, and potentially on a remote machine, to be called as if they were local. Many core Windows and Active Directory capabilities are built on or make use of RPC, which makes...
item.dc:creator: EdanZwick

item.title: Designing for High Availability: The Operational Reference for Running a Geo-Replicated ACR
item.description: By Johnson Shi, Zoey (Zhuyu) Li, Huangli Wu Introduction Three of the most common questions we hear from enterprise teams running geo-replicated Azure Container Registries (ACR) are: "How do I control which region serves my traffic?" — When my AKS clusters are spread across regions, can I pin each...
item.dc:creator: johnsonshi_msft

item.title: AI-Powered Power BI reporting: From design to deployment with agent skills (Preview)
item.description: AI powered Power BI reporting skills is a collection of multiple skills that enables AI agents to automate report creation, from designing pages to publishing to Fabric. Now available through the Power BI authoring plugin in Skills for Fabric —a first-party catalog of agent skills for Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: Sharlkaur

item.title: Connect Metrics to Traces with Exemplars in Azure Monitor
item.description: Following Microsoft’s recent GA announcement for OpenTelemetry (OTel) support, we are excited to announce support for Exemplars for customers instrumenting metrics with Prometheus or OpenTelemetry and traces using OpenTelemetry, enhancing Azure Monitor’s integrated observability experience for...
item.dc:creator: sunayanasingh

item.title: .NET at Microsoft Build 2026: Must watch sessions
item.description: Catch up on all the .NET sessions from Microsoft Build 2026 covering .NET 11, union types in C#, AI building blocks, the agentic web, .NET MAUI, and more! The post .NET at Microsoft Build 2026: Must watch sessions appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Roth

item.title: IP allow list coverage for EMU namespaces in general availability
item.description: GitHub Enterprise Cloud with Enterprise Managed Users (EMUs) can now enforce GitHub’s native IP allow list configuration across user namespaces. This feature is now generally available. EMUs allow the enterprise… The post IP allow list coverage for EMU namespaces in general availability appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Enterprise Live Migrations: Moving from Azure DevOps Repo to GitHub with minimal disruption
item.description: Over the last several years, we’ve encouraged customers to move their repositories from Azure Repos to GitHub to take advantage of the latest AI-powered and agentic development experiences. For many enterprise teams, however, migrating at scale comes with real constraints. Traditional approaches...
item.dc:creator: Soo Stahl, Bhuvan Shah

item.title: GitHub for Beginners: Answers to some common questions
item.description: Find the answers to some of the most common GitHub-related questions. The post GitHub for Beginners: Answers to some common questions appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Guevara

item.title: AI brands as bait: How threat actors are using the AI hype in social engineering
item.description: As threat actors operationalize AI to accelerate attacks, they are also leveraging the wider global interest around AI itself as a social engineering lure. The post AI brands as bait: How threat actors are using the AI hype in social engineering appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Threat Intelligence and Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: GA of NSP for Azure Service Bus & NSP now available in Azure Gov. Regions
item.description: TL; DR Network Security Perimeter (NSP) support for Azure Service Bus is now Generally Available. With this, you can now place your Service Bus namespace inside a central security boundary and apply perimeter-based governance for inbound/outbound network access—while keeping key PaaS-to-PaaS...
item.dc:creator: shashankamalladi

item.title: Now in preview: built-in MCP for Azure App Service
item.description: At Build 2026 last week, we announced the public preview of built-in MCP for Azure App Service. It does one thing, and it does it with almost no effort on your part: it turns a REST API you already host on App Service into a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, so AI agents and assistants can call...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: SharePoint and OneDrive Shortcuts in OneLake (Generally Available)
item.description: For most enterprises, the largest and fastest-growing repository of business-critical information is SharePoint and OneDrive. Contracts, financial models, project plans, meeting notes, presentations, and compliance documentation accumulate across every team and department, rich with context that...
item.dc:creator: shiv_narayanan

item.title: The Worm in the Supply Chain: How Defender for Endpoint and Sentinel for SAP BTP Caught Shai-Hulud
item.description: On 29 April 2026, malicious versions of multiple SAP ecosystem npm packages were briefly published, creating a supply-chain exposure for SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) development environments and CI/CD pipelines. For a brief window that morning, affected developers have executed a...
item.dc:creator: MartinPankraz

item.title: Designing Reliable Data Platforms: Centralized Failure Logging Framework with Azure Monitor
item.description: Introduction Modern data platforms are no longer just about moving and transforming data. In production, what really matters is reliability and how quickly you can understand and react when something breaks. If you’re using Azure Synapse/ADF/Microsoft Fabric, you already have built-in monitoring....
item.dc:creator: Sally_Dabbah

item.title: Microsoft Extends Sensitivity Label Block for Connected Services
item.description: The BlockContentAnalysisServices sensitivity label setting blocks access to Microsoft connected services for the content of labeled Office documents. The intention is that users assign sensitivity labels with the block setting to protect an organization’s most sensitive files. Regretfully,...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Getting Secrets Out of YAML: Implementing Azure Key Vault CSI Driver on AKS with Workload Identity
item.description: Table of Contents Why This Pattern Matters The Problem with Secrets in YAML What We Wanted to Achieve Architecture Overview How the Flow Works Implementation Prerequisites Step-by-Step Implementation Understanding the YAML Components Secret Rotation and Reloaders Common Pitfalls and Troubleshooting...
item.dc:creator: anandranjan

item.title: Faster az login: introducing --skip-subscription-discovery and targeted --subscription
item.description: TL;DR — If you belong to many tenants, or a tenant holds hundreds or thousands of subscriptions, az login can crawl — it tries to enumerate every subscription in every tenant before it returns. Two flags now let you skip that enumeration and make login near-instant: az login --tenant <TENANT_ID>...
item.dc:creator: Alex-wdy

item.title: Build 26300 Activation fail..
item.description: After I Upgrade to 26300 from Broken Foced Update 26200, Begging of April 2026.Struggle with Help of Co-pilot & Gemini, 20 Hrs a Day, Couldn't Fix...I Tried Reinstall 26100 & 26200 from Usb, Format,Cleaned by Co-pilot & Gemini Min 40+ Times,Cannot Fix., I Upgraded to 26300,Problem Still Exist but...
item.dc:creator: wisejayc

item.title: problemes selection windows insider previews canary
item.description: bonjourje suis sous Windows insider sous Windows 11 64 bits et je n arrive pas a réinstaller Windows insider Canary tout est grise et je n arrive pas dégriser choisir vos paramètres insider pour remettre sur Canarymerci de vos réponses et bon Week end a tous
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHE2030

item.title: Update: You can now control Teams Meeting Recording expiration notification emails
item.description: Hey Teams community, We've heard the feedback. For admins and users managing a high volume of meetings, TMR expiration emails can pile up fast. We've been working on giving you control, and that control is now here. What's new Tenant admins can now use a PowerShell cmdlet to suppress Teams Meeting...
item.dc:creator: Eddie_Harmon

item.title: Govern AI Agents Using Agent Governance Toolkit and Azure Container App Sandboxes
item.description: When you let a model generate code and you actually execute it, you are handing the model a Python REPL on whatever machine runs the agent. That sounds alarmist — right up until a planner (yours, mine, or anyone else's) produces a snippet that reads as harmless on the first pass: # "summarize the...
item.dc:creator: amolravande

item.title: GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex deprecated
item.description: As of today, June 5, 2026, we have deprecated the following models across most GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions). Note… The post GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex deprecated appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: New Capabilities to Observe Agents in Azure Monitor
item.description: Over the last six months, we have been listening to you and building new capabilities to help you observe your agents. You’ve been sharing with us that quality issues are tricky and evaluation is critical, that agent reasoning needs to be understood, that humans must be in the loop to review select...
item.dc:creator: MattMc

item.title: Action required: Kerberos RC4 hardening may affect Azure Files Active Directory Domain Services
item.description: A Windows security hardening change beginning in April 2026 updates default Kerberos encryption behavior and may impact customers using Azure Files with Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) authentication over SMB. If you created Azure Files shares prior to 2023, or chose RC4 encryption for...
item.dc:creator: grace_kim

item.title: CodeQL 2.25.6 adds Swift 6.3.2 support and improves C# coverage
item.description: CodeQL is the static analysis engine behind GitHub code scanning, which finds and remediates security issues in your code. We’ve recently released CodeQL 2.25.6, which adds Swift 6.3.2 support, completes… The post CodeQL 2.25.6 adds Swift 6.3.2 support and improves C# coverage appeared first on The...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Enterprise-managed plugins in VS Code in public preview
item.description: Last month we launched a public preview with Copilot CLI that allows enterprise administrators the ability to configure and distribute plugins to GitHub Copilot CLI users across their enterprise. VS… The post Enterprise-managed plugins in VS Code in public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft rewards, how am i gonna redeem my rewards
item.description: How am i gonna redeem my rewards in Microsoft rewards if i can't even do phone verification?? It says it's not allowed… Microsoft pls fix this. Thanks
item.dc:creator: Isaiah_Cacho_95
